Kql: print d = dynamic({"vals":[1,2,3]}) | extend doubled = array_iff(dynamic([true,false,true]), d.vals, dynamic([0,0,0]))
Sql: SELECT *, TO_JSON(LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_ZIP(LIST_VALUE(TRUE, FALSE, TRUE), json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.vals'), '$[*]'), LIST_VALUE(0, 0, 0)), x -> CASE WHEN x[1] THEN x[2] ELSE x[3] END)) AS doubled FROM (SELECT '{"vals":[1,2,3]}'::JSON AS d)

Kql: print d = dynamic({"a":[1,2,3],"b":[4,5,6]}) | extend zipped = zip(d.a, d.b) | mv-expand z = zipped | project lhs = toint(z[0]), rhs = toint(z[1]), prod = toint(z[0]) * toint(z[1])
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS lhs, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS rhs, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (0) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) * TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(z, '$[' || (1) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS prod FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS z FROM (SELECT *, TO_JSON(LIST_TRANSFORM(range(1, GREATEST(LEN(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.a'), '$[*]')), LEN(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.b'), '$[*]'))) + 1), lambda i: [json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.a'), '$[*]')[i], json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.b'), '$[*]')[i]])) AS zipped FROM (SELECT '{"a":[1,2,3],"b":[4,5,6]}'::JSON AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.zipped IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.zipped) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.zipped AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.zipped) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.zipped), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.zipped, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.zipped] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value))

Kql: datatable(t:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ] | make-series s = sum(v) default = 0 on t from 1 to 10 step 3 | extend gt15 = array_iff(series_greater(s, 15), s, -1)
Sql: SELECT *, LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_ZIP(LIST_TRANSFORM(s, x -> x > 15), s), x -> CASE WHEN x[1] THEN x[2] ELSE (-1) END) AS gt15 FROM (SELECT LIST(COALESCE(s_val, 0) ORDER BY _ts) AS s, LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t FROM (SELECT (1) + _i*(3) AS _ts FROM range(0, CAST(CEIL(((10) - (1))/(3)) AS BIGINT)) AS _r(_i)) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT ((1) + FLOOR(((t) - (1))/(3))*(3)) AS _bucket, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket)
